violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Reach in sliding door cooler at bar used to hold beverages and condiments has compressor drain issue/leak. Container used to collect water inside unit.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - General cleaning needed. Inside all coolers & freezers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - General cleaning needed. Doors & side panels of all equipment.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Hood/filters need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - General cleaning needed.
